_fixture.purpose: Mode B SIMULATOR SCRAPE→TERMINATE transition body. Isracard per-card transactions endpoint `POST https://web.isracard.co.il/ocp/transactions/DigitalV3.Transactions/GetTransactionsList`. The `/ocp/statuspage/` widget variant is REJECTED by the production picker (ScrapeWK.ts:65-77: `transactionWidgets: [/\/statuspage\//i]`) because it truncates to a 5-record cap; only the `/ocp/transactions/` per-card API serves full history. data is an array of card-grouped transactions; placeholder uses synthetic FIXTURE markers (no PII).
